ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level */,
  "color_blindness" INTEGER /* Color blindness indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., color matching, color naming) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the task belongs to */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response provided by the participant */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_responses_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_tasks" (
  "color_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color task */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the color task belongs to */,
  "color1" TEXT /* First color presented in the task */,
  "color2" TEXT /* Second color presented in the task */,
  "color3" TEXT /* Third color presented in the task */,
  "color_format" TEXT /* Format of the color (e.g., RGB, HEX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_responses" (
  "color_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color response */,
  "color_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color task the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Color response provided by the participant */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_responses_color_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_task_id") REFERENCES color_tasks ("color_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_metrics" (
  "distance_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance metric */,
  "color_response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color response the distance metric belongs to */,
  "distance_metric" TEXT /* Type of distance metric (e.g., HSV, RGB, Lab) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the distance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the distance metric (e.g., percentage, degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distance_metrics_color_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_response_id") REFERENCES color_responses ("color_response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the rating */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the participant */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., difficulty, enjoyment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the click */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the click belongs to */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks made by the participant */,
  "click_time" INTEGER /* Time of the click in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments_researchers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment (e.g., principal investigator, co-investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant group */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the participant group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_groups_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_group_members" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant group */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the participant joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response provided by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
